sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 01 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.24 2. For orders on CMA No.01/2023 3. For hearing of main case 18.11.2025 Mr. Mohsin Ali Shah advocate holds brief for Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for the applicant This reference application is pending since 2023 and ad-interim orders are also operating. Counsel for the applicant has not appeared ever since the first date. On 21.10.2025 brief was held on his behalf and adjournment was sought. Despite fixed date being given learned counsel remained absent without intimation or justification on the next date. Today, once again brief is being held and adjournment is being sought. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceeding. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
